productDisplayName: Lotto Men's Fuerzapura Red Black Shoe
description: Flex your versatility with the lotto Fuerzapura L500 FG soccer shoes and take the game by storm. Replete with a water repellent upper and central lacing, this shoe weighing about 9.2 ounces is designed to keep your feet snugly Fit for you to enjoy a firm ground soccer game with ease.Upper Water-repellent premium plus upper for breathability and durability when playing on wet grounds Synthetic central lacing for snug fit Glossy finish upper to add an element of style Cushioned collar and padded tongue for snug fit and comfort Midsole Anatomically deisgned EVA insole for comfort and arch support Removable footbed for easy maintenance and to accommodate an orthotic Outsole Puntoflex outsole with ReactiveArch technology for improved performance on firm and natural surfaces Shock-Off unit in the heel absorbs strong impacts when the foot lands Hard rubber spikes lined below the heel and toe counter for easy play on hard ground surfaces Wash careRub surface with a soft, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
